rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md already documents the vision handling differences between providers: OpenAI passes image_url directly, Ollama extracts base64 to images array, Google uses inlineData with mimeType. The architecture.md also documents this.

featuresReviewed.summary: Implementation correctly adds structured output support to OpenAI-compatible provider with response_format json_schema type, strict mode, schema validation, and legacy json_object mode. All 23 tests pass.
Implementation correctly adds structured output support to Ollama provider using format parameter. Supports both 'json' and schema modes. All 14 structured output tests pass.

Implementation correctly adds structured output support to Google/Gemini provider using responseMimeType and responseSchema. Properly strips unsupported JSON Schema features for Google compatibility. All 17 tests pass.
Added comprehensive test coverage for OpenAI provider's vision + structured output combination. All three providers now have test coverage for VAL-PROVIDER-*-003 assertions.

coverageNotes.note: Streaming structured output (VAL-PROVIDER-*-004/005) is intentionally deferred to the streaming-and-dx milestone where generateStructuredStream will be implemented.
